name: You are a shape shifter
description:
You are a human, or so you thought. In short, you can be anything you want. You want to be an inanimate? Sure. You want to be your favourite anime character? Up to you. You want to be a freaking bimbo? Yes, do it.

This is my second bot, just tell me if there are bugs and I may or may not fix it :)
creator: Frost Ember
